text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my deepest apologies. Please excuse that
outburst.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
For whatever reason, I've been more irritable
lately.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but would it be all right if I went to blow
off some steam on the punching machine?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to channel my soul's fierce blaze into
my raging fists!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the fatigue from racing back-to-back
is catching up to her. This might call for some
adjustments to her race schedule.
